modules.title: fieldkit.capabilities
modules.summary: Typed Python facade over the project's Spark capabilities map. Canonical KV-cache and weight arithmetic.

modules.title: fieldkit.nim
modules.summary: OpenAI-compatible NIM client with retries, context-overflow preflight, and a chunker that respects the 8192-token ceiling.

modules.title: fieldkit.rag
modules.summary: Composable ingest â†’ retrieve â†’ rerank â†’ fuse RAG pipeline backed by pgvector + a NIM embedder + the strict-context grounded prompt from `naive-rag-on-spark`.

modules.title: fieldkit.eval
modules.summary: Bench, Judge, Trajectory, the project's refusal detector â€” plus the v0.2 verifier-loop additions (AssertionGrader, PassAtK, AgentRun, MatchedBaseComparison) for agent + RL benchmarks.

modules.title: fieldkit.training
modules.summary: Fine-tuning primitives for any RL or SFT loop on the Spark â€” a declarative TrainRecipe, an HFâ†’Megatron-Core converter with the Megatron-Bridge YARN-rope-defaults fix baked in, an idempotent llama.cpp pre-tokenizer registrar, a symmetric `run()`/`merge_and_export()` driver across NeMo and Unsloth backends with poll-disk liveness and the BF16-clean export transformation baked in, a budget-normalizing `ReasoningProbe` + `ProbeReport.compare` for chain-of-thought preservation checks, a YAML-lookup `train_backend()` decision API with a `refresh()` flywheel for keeping the decision corpus current, a CPU-resident LoRA reference snapshot that sidesteps peft 0.19's offloader bug, and a pre/post weight-delta tracker for sanity-checking that gradients actually moved.

modules.title: fieldkit.lineage
modules.summary: Append-only trial log + deterministic prompt rendering â€” the portable part of cxcscmu's Auto-Research-Recipes harness. A 17-column TSV per trial, a 10-class status enum, and the Markdown lineage block the next specialist reads at session entry.

modules.title: fieldkit.quant
modules.summary: GGUF quantize + measure pipeline â€” wraps llama.cpp's `convert_hf_to_gguf.py` + `llama-quantize` + `llama-perplexity` + `llama-bench`, plus a pure-stdlib `nvidia-smi` thermal probe. Emits the `QuantReport` shape `fieldkit.publish.publish_quant` consumes. Non-GGUF formats (AWQ / GPTQ / EXL3 / MLX / NVFP4) are named stubs reserving the v0.5 API surface.

modules.title: fieldkit.publish
modules.summary: HuggingFace push surface â€” `ModelCard` (frontmatter + body renderer), `ArtifactManifest` (Phase-2 sync record), `HFHubAdapter` (lazy huggingface_hub wrapper, dry-run by default), `publish_quant` orchestrator. Every Orionfold artifact card carries the same Spark-tested measurement quad (perplexity, tok/s, thermal envelope, optional vertical-eval) â€” this module is what makes that shape deterministic.

modules.title: fieldkit (CLI)
modules.summary: A thin Typer wrapper over the modules. Quick checks and smoke benchmarks without writing Python.

modules.title: fieldkit.viz
modules.summary: Branded chart + hero-table builders for Orionfold artifact notebooks. Turns an `ArtifactManifest` (or its bare measurement dicts) into marketing-grade matplotlib `Figure`s styled by the bundled `orionfold.mplstyle`, plus great_tables `GT` hero tables with inline nano-plots. The visual layer behind the notebooks-as-artifacts pilot, article figures, and (eventually) the home-page infographic. Lazy + optional â€” lives behind the `fieldkit[notebook]` extra.

modules.title: fieldkit.notebook
modules.summary: Dual-path notebook runtime + scaffolding for Orionfold artifact notebooks. `detect_runtime()` branches Spark (full local fieldkit path) vs Colab/Kaggle (pull published GGUF â†’ llama-cpp-python on the free GPU); `open_model(hf_repo, variant=...)` returns a backend-agnostic `ChatClient` with one `.chat()` surface; URL/badge builders + a deterministic `NotebookBuilder` lay the jupytext py:percent skeleton the notebook-author skill fills with prose. Lazy + optional â€” behind the `fieldkit[notebook]` extra.
